mechanism_narrative: A higher 3-month growth rate in RSAFS signals stronger household demand and higher expected near-term corporate revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS snapshot available at decision time was 492717.0
failure_condition: Reject if higher RSAFS 3-month growth does not produce higher subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS rises rapidly, the equity discount rate increases and valuation multiples contract, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 6-month moving average after increasing by >0.50 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot available at decision time was 1.16
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 55% of the time, or if triggered mean returns are not below untriggered mean returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS growth combined with a falling UNRATE signals expanding labor income without visible labor-market deterioration, raising earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshots available were PAYEMS 147241.0 and UNRATE 4.1
regime_hint: mid-cycle expansion with improving labor conditions
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition fails to outperform all other labor states over 20 trading days, or if interaction term t-statistic is below 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals rising recession probability and downward revisions to earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by >0.30 percentage points from its trailing 3-month low
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE snapshot available at decision time was 4.1
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE rises are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if downside return skew is not larger than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A breakdown in HOUST signals weaker interest-sensitive demand and future pressure on construction, materials, and consumer durable activity, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average after a 3-month decline > 10%
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST snapshot available at decision time was 1290.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakdown triggers do not precede below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the conditional hit rate for negative returns is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL momentum together with rising FEDFUNDS signals inflation pressure and tighter policy at the same time, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth increases versus its prior 3-month rate and FEDFUNDS rises by >0.25 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshots available were CPIAUCSL 247.592 and FEDFUNDS 1.16
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-up and FEDFUNDS-up interaction has nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns, or if its coefficient is not negative in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals improving production volumes and operating leverage, raising expected profits and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO snapshot available at decision time was 106.3969
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum does not predict higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than negative INDPRO momentum, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarter-over-quarter growth in GDPC1 signals broad real demand expansion and stronger aggregate earnings capacity, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest GDPC1 snapshot available at decision time was 17169.733
failure_condition: Reject if stronger GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is not associated with higher 60-day S&P 500 returns out of sample, or if the sign is negative in two consecutive 5-year windows.
